content:
Think about it like Mario Maker or Trackmania, being able to create our own stages in an online stage library would be awesome and would also help for testing/evaluating characters and give all kinds of players fun tools to use.

Whales could create incredibly hard stages and show off their AA clears, mid level players can push their teamcomps to the absolute most and beginner players can ease themselves into different mechanics. It would help players familiarize themselves with certain bosses/enemies/mechanics.

Im obviously aware this would take a lot of development time and commitment but i truly imagine it would help longevity and be amazing for the community. 

Giving your players tools for their own content would also relieve pressure on the team and even help with recreating bugs and solving them.
thread_title: give the players tools to create their own stages

content:
剛剛填問卷結果送出太快，打的遊戲建議內容只好在這邊補上
(第一次使用DC有問必答，請多指教
最近我突然想到身為守密人因該也有自己的房間吧?
不知道是否可考慮在遊戲內新增守咪人的房間(Q版的)，然後擺設可於遊戲內用每日通貨或是某些資源換取，部分商店或限定購買也無所謂。

因為大廳除了放喜愛的喚醒體立繪以外，只有背景的替換，然後卡牌遊玩內容有很多可愛的貼圖，如果貼圖內的那些角色，可以變成Q版角色會隨機跑到守密人的房間(出現以後惡作劇或是特殊對話類似每日郵箱的特殊信件)，感覺遊戲會更生動更貼切。
讓我們在融蝕危機中也能有一些樂趣及安慰，這是我最近想到的，希望能讓遊戲有更多有趣內容的想法。
這遊戲很棒，期許有更多吸引人的內容，也希望大家多提供想法!
以上
~願銀鑰指引我們前行~
thread_title: 遊戲內容建議

content: Hi, at some point in time I think the patches have made it so that Salvador's Absolute Axion bonus to his Exalt "He Who Protects" stacks linearly with his Overexalt Bonus "Rite of Creation" - causing the conversion to become a total bonus of +275% instead of +337.5% - this obviously weakens the interaction between overexalt and Absolute Axiom quite severely.
thread_title: Salvador AA - unintended change.

content:
您好，

我在 Linux 上通过 Steam Proton 启动游戏时遇到了一个渲染问题。因为游戏本来就有手机端所以我也不太清楚处理这个的技术难度可不可以接受<:please:1356053110375714817> 

  问题描述：
  当游戏弹出内置系统窗口时，例如登录界面、问卷/调查窗口等，窗口内容会持续闪烁/闪屏。但交互本身并没有失
  效。我通过抓帧/截图确认按钮位置后，仍然可以正常点击按钮并完成交互(比如成功使用google帐号登录游戏)，所以问题看起来主要是渲染显示异常，

  复现步骤：

  1. 在 Linux 上使用 Steam Proton 启动游戏。
  2. 触发游戏内置系统窗口，例如登录窗口或问卷窗口。
  3. 窗口内容会持续闪烁。
  4. 如果知道按钮位置，点击仍然可以正常生效。

  期望结果：
  登录、问卷等内置窗口应正常渲染，不应闪烁。

  实际结果：
  窗口画面持续闪烁，但鼠标交互仍然有效。

  系统信息：

  - 系统：Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS
  - 内核：Linux 6.17.0-1017-oem
  - 桌面环境：GNOME / Wayland
  - CPU：AMD Ryzen AI 9 H 365 w/ Radeon 880M，10 核 20 线程
  - 内存：32 GiB
  - GPU：AMD Radeon 890M Graphics
  - 显卡内核驱动：amdgpu
  - Mesa / OpenGL：Mesa 25.2.8-0ubuntu0.24.04.1
  - OpenGL 渲染器：AMD Radeon 890M Graphics, radeonsi, gfx1150, LLVM 20.1.2, DRM 3.64
  - Proton 版本：Proton Experimental，experimental-11.0-20260506b (其他版本的 proton 也有这个问题)
  -   Vulkan：
    - Vulkan Instance Version：1.3.275
    - GPU：AMD Radeon 890M Graphics (RADV GFX1150)
    - Vulkan 驱动：Mesa RADV
    - Vulkan 驱动版本：Mesa 25.2.8-0ubuntu0.24.04.1
    - 设备报告的 Vulkan API 版本：1.4.318
    - 系统中也存在 llvmpipe CPU 软件渲染 fallback
thread_title: steam端linux系统适配

這回調問題是不打算處理了?
雖然沒打算燒起來，但你們製作組跟維護組(?)可否謹慎點，上次是誕墨獻祭無視加固，這次是修bug後回調，甚至回調前各個平台都出了各種上述兩機制聯動的視頻或攻略，隔了一星期回調相當於嚴重誤導玩家抽取判斷，別搞到哪天起爭議再出一次福袋事件

thread_title: Anti-AI Policy

content:
it’s absolute insane how you can speak about “no repercussions”, when you literally just popped out and threw insults at me like being “incredibly tone deaf and disrespectful”, when that is a clear violation of server rules, not to mention being insensitive to people who actually suffer from medical tone deafness 

i literally posted the vortice pictures as a meme begging the devs to consider improving her pursuit animation in their busy schedule
and wasn’t trying to discredit any fan art what so ever, heck this server doesn’t even have any rules on posting AI pictures of morimens characters 

being attacked out of no where is actually wild
thread_title: Anti-AI Policy

content: i called you tone deaf because youre asking for artists and animators to improve an animation in game you find underwhelming (which i agree with btw) and then feed artists work into an AI to create soulless "art", its not an insult to call an action tone deaf and disrespectful its simply an observation of what you are doing
thread_title: Anti-AI Policy

content: also if you want to get into the semantics of it tone deaf can also simply be used as a synonym for someone being insensitive
thread_title: Anti-AI Policy
Anti-AI Policy

content:
that is your interpretation and you are 100% free to have it, personally i will respect regardless if the devs use AI to improve vortice’s animation or through their own. i’m not here to police the moral dilemma regarding AI usage. 

i have no interest in getting into semantics, the only reason i brought that up is because i have a friend who is partially deaf and i’ve seen how hard their life can be. to throw around “tone deafness” as an insult to me out of no where is pure ignorance and a poor choice of words. 

i am sure someone as well spoken like you understands how certain “choice” of words can come across as being derogatory
thread_title: Anti-AI Policy

content: by your same logic one can even stretch it to call a person a “r3tard” and then say it’s an observation and that it’s a synonym for being “slow”
